title: Smoked Nutty Smokey Norvegian Anchovy Pasta
description: A light and cozy Norwegian dish featuring Thai fish sauce, sautéed with smoked nuts for a nutty twist, and served over pasta as a low-fat-friendly option.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Rinse pasta and cook according to package instructions, set aside.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add smoked almonds, dried cranberries, and sauté for about 2 minutes until slightly toasted.
Add Thai fish sauce to the pan and stir well to combine with ingredients, reducing any excess liquid. Stir in chopped parsley and sesame seeds; season with salt as desired.
Drain cooked pasta and add it to the pan mixture. Toss gently to coat pasta evenly with the nutty-smoky sauce.
